_publications._publicationTitle: Synergistic effect of Nutlin-3 combined with MG-132 on schwannoma cells through restoration of merlin and p53 tumour suppressors.

_contextSnippet: cell viability decreased in a dose- and time-dependent manner in response to Nutlin-3...The cell viabilities were compared between different treatment groups
details: Successfully measured dose- and time-dependent cell viability changes in response to Nutlin-3 and MG-132 treatments across multiple cell types
